title: China Opposes Philippines Involving US in South China Sea Drills
summary: China criticized the Philippines for involving external powers like the US in South China Sea military drills.
contents:
# China Opposes Philippines Involving US in South China Sea Drills

## Overview
China criticized the Philippines for involving external powers like the US in South China Sea military drills.

## Details
Chinese Defense Ministry spokesman Zhang Xiaogang stated opposition to the Philippines dragging outside actors into regional affairs during joint US-Philippine Balikatan exercises. The statement got made on April 30 amid ongoing tensions in the South China Sea. This reflects Beijing's stance against foreign military involvement in the disputed region.

## Location
Beijing, China

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @BeltelFreeAudio OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
South China Sea, China-Philippines tensions, Balikatan drills, US-Philippines military, regional security
